deck_title: Hoshino Premium Bottled Matcha — Launch Proposal

slides.title: The Insight
bullets: Affluent women in their 50s don't buy tea for thrift — they buy a shared health ritual.
One persona, one habit moment: the 3pm reset she shares with her husband.
slides.visual_hint: single persona photo, one stat overlay

evidence.why: same client, same segment — the ritual framing won last time

slides.title: The Audience, In Their Own Data
bullets: TV 58% daily reach; TikTok 41% via family (F50 media habits survey, Mar 2026).
Expert endorsement drives trust in this segment.
slides.visual_hint: two big numbers from the survey

slides.title: Creative Direction
bullets: 30s TV spot anchored on the shared ritual moment, expert voice-over.

evidence.why: self-reward framing succeeded with the same segment

avoided_risks.lesson: Broad targeting reads as generic — we commit to ONE persona.
Insight must match the client's own research — validated against Hoshino's brief before slide 1.

prediction.expects: success — insight-first + survey-backed + same-client precedent all align
prediction.risks: if lost, likely on price positioning (cf. out-tokai-2026-02 pattern)
